full_text:
Liu He 劉和
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu He (劉和)was born in Donghai. Ordered to escape capital and seek help for Xian. Captured by Yuan’s, later sent against Zan. Liu He was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Yuan Shao.
